subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Were it not for tribulations in Thy path, whence would the stations of Thy lovers be made manifest? [3.5s]... ...I implore Thee, O My God and the King of the nations, and ask Thee by the Greatest Name, to change the throne of tyranny into a centre of justice and the seat of pride and iniquity into the chair of humbleness and justice. Thou art free to do whatsoever Thou wishest and Thou art the All-Knowing, the Wise!
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی لو لا البلایا فی سبیلک من این یظهر مقامات عاشقیک و لو لا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
